HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Individual users will see Register disabled if they have not taken or not registered for pre-req.
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Today pre-requisites needed for a course does not check if user qualifies leading to a poor user experience.
HVAC Learning Campus.Status Details: Cornerstone has a bug for the current bulk registration feature. Must be fixed to implement individual feature.

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Given there are more than 400 classes, gives users a clear, structured learning journey, removing guesswork about what to take next.
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Improves learning efficiency, speeds up skill development, and increases engagement by aligning training directly to their goals and responsibilities.

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Use AI search for more direct path to specific training information
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Users have given feedback to easily search for classes and be able to get information easily.

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Centralizes key training information, like completed courses, in-progress classes, favorites, recommendations, and class communication into one clear, personalized dashboard.
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Eliminates the need to search across the site. This streamlines navigation, helps users quickly pick up where they left off, and drives engagement by surfacing relevant next steps.

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: On register/launch user will stay on HVAC-LC and everything will take place inside Daikin brand
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: User is taken to Cornerstone site when they register or launch leading to poor UX

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Enable text communication if user opts in and provded phone number
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Helps users who are on field and not email savvy to understand class changes (cancellation), downtime

HVAC Learning Campus.Detail: Product to support spanish speaking user from navigation. Content build is to be done by Tech Training.
HVAC Learning Campus.Why / Expected Outcome: Accessible to a broader audience, removing language barriers and increasing adoption. It also improves comprehension and engagement, leading to better learning outcomes and higher completion rate.
HVAC Learning Campus.Dependency: Tech Training - need to check their timing.

Daikin City.Detail:
Independent tool that can be used by any application to create a submittal data sheet or submittal package.  As of today, it only creates Submittal Data Sheets.  Package and an admin tool for editing is later.
Examples of the .pdf generated.
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome:
1) Allows our customers to present clearer, more professional proposals, increasing credibility and confidence with end uses.  
2) Speeds up the proposal process giving our customer a competitive advantage to assist in winning more contracts.

Daikin City.Detail: Include all product information and update the style and flow.
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome: Improving navigation and providing complete, easy-to-access information to reduce customer friction and results in faster purchase decision along with improved submittal process. This increases trust, shortens the sales cycle, and drives higher conversion rates and overall sales.

Simplifies decision-making, builds user confidence through clearer product information, and reduces friction—leading to higher adoption, increased conversion rates, larger order values, and fewer support issues.

Daikin City.Detail:
Independent tool that can be used by any application to create a submittal data sheet or submittal package.  As of today, it only creates Submittal Data Sheets.  Package and an admin tool for editing is later.
Examples of the .pdf generated.
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome:
1) Allows our customers to present clearer, more professional proposals, increasing credibility and confidence with end users.  
2) Speeds up the proposal process giving our customer a competitive advantage to assist in winning more contracts.
Daikin City.Source: PIM/OTMM data Scorecard for complete Data

Daikin City.Detail: Update Daikin City Product Page regarding UI and information.  Gives the customer one place to view all product information.  Attributes, Documentation, Related Accessories, Warranty Link, etc..
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome: Improving navigation and providing complete, easy-to-access information to reduce customer friction and results in faster purchase decision along with improved submittal process. This increases engagement, shortens the sales cycle, and drives higher conversion rates and overall sales.

Simplifies decision-making, builds user confidence through clearer product information, and reduces friction—leading to higher adoption, increased conversion rates, larger order values, and fewer support issues.

Daikin City.Detail: Create Product Data and Document Scorecard to bring acknowledgement of missing product information
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome: Our product information is currently incomplete which affects all downstream tools, many customer facing.  Plan to surface the missing information for product teams to act upon.

Daikin City.Detail: Allow customer to select Imperial vs Metric for viewing Product attributes
Daikin City.Why / Expected Outcome: Customers from Canada have expressed a need to submit product information in Metric format.

MatchupXpress.Detail: What it is and what it does (1–2 sentences)
MatchupXpress.Why / Expected Outcome: Why this matters + what will change if shipped. Use clear, outcome‑oriented language. Quantification is encouraged but not required. When specific metrics are unknown, describe the expected directional change and how success would be measured.
MatchupXpress.Dependency: Tech, team, vendor, or platform dependency

MatchupXpress.Detail: Standardized analytics events across key user journeys
MatchupXpress.Why / Expected Outcome: Enable consistent measurement across products and features to improve prioritization and iteration.

MatchupXpress.Detail: Step‑by‑step guided flow for initial device setup with validation and recovery
MatchupXpress.Why / Expected Outcome: Reduce setup friction and increase successful activations, leading to higher early engagement. Reduce setup friction to improve activation rate from 62% → 72%.
